gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app showcase reflects the latest usage statistics and operational statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot acting as gardeners, checking on a greenhouse full of pixelated code-plants with a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watering a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking metrics. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watering a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking metrics. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
